 {"id":"gt-4u5z.5","title":"Update architecture documentation","description":"Update all documentation to reflect refinery-as-worktree model.

## Files to update
- docs/architecture.md (if exists)
- CLAUDE.md references to refinery
- mayor/rig/docs/*.md - any refinery docs
- wisp-architecture.md - add MR wisp details
- README files mentioning clone vs worktree

## Key messages
- Refinery is worktree, not clone
- Polecat branches stay local
- Only main pushed to origin
- MRs are wisps (ephemeral)","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:31.192025-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T21:24:01.184709-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T21:24:01.184709-08:00","close_reason":"Updated merge-queue-design.md with new architecture: wisp MRs, local branches, refinery worktree","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-4u5z.5","depends_on_id":"gt-4u5z","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:31.194085-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-4u5z.5","depends_on_id":"gt-4u5z.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:43.819111-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-4u5z.5","depends_on_id":"gt-4u5z.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:43.907113-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-4u5z.5","depends_on_id":"gt-4u5z.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:43.99734-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-4u5z.6","title":"Design future federation model","description":"Document how remote/federated refinery would work in the future.

## Options to document
1. Git bundles - portable patches, no branches on origin
2. Dedicated integration branch pattern (integration/*)
3. Hybrid - local for same-machine, bundles for remote

## Deliverable
Design doc in docs/federation-refinery.md or similar.
Not implementing now - just capturing the design for when needed.","status":"closed","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:32.265488-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T21:28:20.96312-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T21:28:20.96312-08:00","close_reason":"Deferred - will address if/when needed","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-4u5z.6","depends_on_id":"gt-4u5z","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:32.267467-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-4u5z.7","title":"Add migration path for existing rigs","description":"Existing rigs have refinery as clone. Need migration path.

## Options
1. Manual: User runs 'gt rig migrate' or similar
2. Automatic: Detect clone, convert to worktree on next start
3. Deprecation: Old rigs work but warn, new rigs use worktree

## Considerations
- Don't break existing setups
- Clear upgrade path
- Handle in-flight MRs during migration","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:33.746893-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T21:28:20.972695-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T21:28:20.972695-08:00","close_reason":"Deferred - will address if/when needed","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-4u5z.7","depends_on_id":"gt-4u5z","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:33.749766-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-4u5z.7","depends_on_id":"gt-4u5z.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-23T20:25:44.086388-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"gt-4v1eo","title":"Ephemeral protos: Remove proto-as-bead storage, cook inline","description":"## Summary

Refactor the molecular chemistry stack so protos are ephemeral in-memory data structures, not persisted beads with `[template]` labels.

## Current State

```
Formula (.formula.json)  → cook → Proto (bead with [template]) → pour/wisp → Mol/Wisp
```

Protos are stored as beads issues with `labels: ["template"]`, polluting the DB with template definitions that duplicate the formula files.

## Target State

```
Formula (.formula.json)  → pour/wisp (cook inline) → Mol/Wisp
```

Protos exist only as in-memory data structures during the cook→pour/wisp pipeline. Formula catalog IS the proto library.

## Changes Required

1. **Remove template bead storage** - `bd cook` no longer writes to DB
2. **`bd cook` becomes preview** - outputs proto JSON to stdout (like --dry-run)
3. **`bd pour`/`bd wisp` cook inline** - take formula name, cook on the fly
4. **`bd mol bond` accepts formula names** - cooks inline when bonding templates
5. **Remove `[template]` label handling** - no more template beads
6. **Update docs** - molecular-chemistry.md, molecule-algebra.md

## Benefits

- No DB pollution from template beads
- Single source of truth (formulas in .beads/formulas/)
- Simpler mental model: formulas → instances
- Faster (no DB round-trip for protos)

## Deferred

Staged parameterization (proto currying) - punt until someone needs it:
```bash
bd cook mol-feature --var team=backend  # Partially bound proto
bd pour <proto-id> --var priority=high  # Further binding
```

## Depends On

- gt-8tmz (Molecule Algebra) core work should be mostly complete first

## Context

Discussion: Mayor session 2025-12-25, ultrathink on proto storage","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-25T14:27:32.801474-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T16:55:02.246164-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-4v1eo","depends_on_id":"gt-8tmz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-25T14:27:37.721843-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"gt-4xas","title":"Merge fix/spawn-beads-path branch to main","description":"Branch has gt nudge command; main has notification deduplication. Both valuable.

Key insight: Only ~10 commits diverged each way in mayor/rig.
- Branch: 9509afa feat(nudge): Add gt nudge command (MISSING from main)
- Main: d2fccd5 slot-based notification deduplication (KEEP)

Merge plan:
1. git merge fix/spawn-beads-path --no-ff
2. Keep nudge.go from branch
3. Keep notification.go from main
4. Merge tmux.go (both NudgeSession AND SendKeysReplace)
5. go build && go test
6. Deploy to ~/.local/bin/gt","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-20T13:28:01.684557-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T13:30:55.817964-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T13:30:55.817964-08:00"}

 {"id":"gt-lwuu","title":"mol-polecat-work","description":"Full polecat lifecycle from assignment to decommission.

This proto enables nondeterministic idempotence for polecat work.
A polecat that crashes after any step can restart, read its molecule state,
and continue from the last completed step. No work is lost.
